hero.name: Jatuwit
hero.tagline: I build scalable systems and intelligent applications.
hero.subtitle: 7 years of experience architecting robust platforms, optimizing performance, and integrating AI solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I started as a Java Developer at Godygo, building backend APIs for logistics applications. That foundation led me to Avalant, where I evolved into a Full Stack Developer and later Senior Full Stack Developer—spearheading frontend architecture for platforms like "Zero" (No-code) and "PromptX" (AI-driven interface) with React.js and TypeScript.
about.paragraph2: I'm passionate about performance. At Bedrock Analytics, I reduced API response time by 85% (from 8,000ms to 1,200ms) using k6 load testing and refactoring data-fetching to serve geospatial points via .geojson files.
about.paragraph3: Today I focus on AI integration—RAG, Vector Databases, and building intelligent applications that scale. I'm seeking an impactful role to drive innovative software development.

locable.title: Performance Optimization (Locable)
locable.description: Reduced API response time by 85% (from 8,000ms to 1,200ms) using k6 load testing and refactoring data-fetching logic to serve geospatial points directly via .geojson files.

promptx.title: AI-Driven No-Code Platform (PromptX & Zero)
promptx.description: Spearheaded frontend architecture for proprietary platforms including Zero (No-code) and PromptX (AI-driven interface), leveraging React.js and TypeScript to build scalable and highly interactive user interfaces.

highlights: Architected No-Code Map Platform using Mapbox with flexible geospatial management interface
Reduced API response time by 85% (8,000ms → 1,200ms) via k6 load testing and .geojson refactoring
Primary technical consultant for enterprise client (SCG) on system scalability
Mentored 2 junior developers with code reviews and technical direction
Spearheaded frontend architecture for Zero (No-code) and PromptX (AI-driven interface)
Built scalable UIs with React.js and TypeScript
Developed and maintained backend infrastructure for Godygo logistics app
Built reliable APIs for Android mobile interface
